query:
SELECT 
  FIELD('sent', 'error','pending','sent','delivered','read','played') AS sent_pos,
  FIELD('delivered', 'error','pending','sent','delivered','read','played') AS delivered_pos,
  FIELD('read', 'error','pending','sent','delivered','read','played') AS read_pos,
  FIELD('', 'error','pending','sent','delivered','read','played') AS empty_pos,
  FIELD(NULL, 'error','pending','sent','delivered','read','played') AS null_pos,
  FIELD(COALESCE('sent',''), 'error','pending','sent','delivered','read','played') AS coalesce_sent

  FIELD('', 'error','pending','sent','delivered','read','played') AS empty_pos,
  FIELD(NULL, 'error','pending','sent','delivered','read','played') AS null_pos,
  FIELD(COALESCE('sent',''), 'error','pending','sent','delivered','read','played') AS coalesce_sent
